title: Lume's Sensible Stonecutter
description: Makes stonecrafting sensible, with way more stone-related cutting and recipe options (138 new recipes, 18 changed recipes)
body:
This mod makes the following stones stone tool materials: 
- Stone
- Cobblestone
- Granite
- Diorite
- Andesite
- Deepslate
- Cobbled Deepslate
- Smooth Basalt
- Blackstone
- Tuff
- Dripstone

The following recipes use stone tool materials instead of only cobblestone: 
- Furnace
- Brewing Stand
- Lever
- Piston
- Dispenser
- Dropper
- Observer

With stonecutting, stone can be changed back to cobblestone and cut/smooth sandstone can be changed back to regular sandstone. Stone (as in all the stones) stairs/slabs/walls can be polished and whatnot, and stairs can be cut down to slabs. Regular, natural deepslate can be used in stonecutting, and blocks that normally can be crafted into stairs and slabs but not cut can now be stonecut into those stairs and slabs (I'm looking at you, pillars.)

Overall, this mod adds 116 recipes and changes 18 vanilla ones. 

It's recommended to install [Campfire Cracking](https://modrinth.com/datapack/campfire-cracking)! I'm not sure if I should implement the features over in this mod or not, but for now I'm keeping them seperate, though I'm leaning towards incorporating it and just leaving Campfire Cracking as like a sub-datapack for those who just want that functionality. 

_Currently no mod support_
